question_text: How important is it to you to have sufficient time for your personal or family life?
How important is it to you to have freedom to adopt your own approach to the job?
How important is it to you to work with people who cooperate well with one another?
How important is it to you to live in a desirable area for you and your family?
In choosing an ideal job, how important would it be to you to have an opportunity for high earnings?
In choosing an ideal job, how important would it be to you to have an opportunity for advancement?
In choosing an ideal job, how important would it be to you to work with people who cooperate well with one another?
In choosing an ideal job, how important would it be to you to have good working conditions such as ventilation and lighting?
How strongly do you agree: Maintaining harmony with others is more important than expressing my personal opinions.
How strongly do you agree: When there is a conflict in a group, it is better to compromise than to insist on one's own position.
How strongly do you agree: The needs of the group should take priority over the needs of the individual.
How strongly do you agree: It is important to maintain good relationships with others even if it means not pursuing personal goals.
How strongly do you agree: Helping each other is a fundamental characteristic of human society.
How strongly do you agree: Community cooperation is the foundation of social life.
How strongly do you agree: I prefer to make my own decisions rather than follow group consensus.
How strongly do you agree: Personal achievement is more important than group success.
How strongly do you agree: I should be free to pursue my own goals even if they differ from what others around me expect.
How strongly do you agree: Individual rights are more important than community obligations.
